app.title: Genshin Teams Tracker
app_shell.title: Genshin Teams Tracker - App Shell Prototype
right_panel.hexerei.source_tooltip_body:
Display-only team reference. Does not affect stats.
Hover a member icon to view that character's active Hexerei bonuses.
filter.region.title: Region
hoyolab.profile_busy: The HoYoLAB profile is busy. If the authorization browser is open, close it. The app will check login again after it closes.
hoyolab.not_logged_in: HoYoLAB login was not found. Authorize and close the browser window.
hoyolab.login_browser_open: The HoYoLAB browser is open. Log in, confirm that the account is visible, then close the browser.
hoyolab.login_hint_body: Log in to your profile in the browser. When the login is done, close the browser window and the app will continue automatically.
hoyolab.authorize_instruction:
A separate HoYoLAB browser window will open. Log in, confirm that the page shows your profile, then close the browser and return to the app.

If you already have a saved offline profile, you can load it from Profile... without HoYoLAB authorization.
hoyolab.close_browser_before_switch: Close the current HoYoLAB browser window before changing account.
hoyolab.reset_failed: Could not reset profile or clear HoYoLAB data: {error}
hoyolab.auth_not_found: HoYoLAB authorization was not found. Please authorize first and check that the HoYoLAB page shows your account before closing the browser.
hoyolab.import_failed: HoYoLAB import did not finish. Check authorization and the console log.
loader.opening_character_list: Opening the character list on HoYoLAB...
loader.collecting_inventory: Waiting for the HoYoLAB character list...
loader.waiting_export_images: Waiting for HoYoLAB to finish loading visible images...
loader.waiting_image_download: Waiting for the image download to start...
loader.retrying_image_download_2: Could not start the download, trying again (2/3)...
loader.retrying_image_download_3: Could not start the download, final attempt (3/3)...
loader.waiting_image_generation: HoYoLAB started generating the image, waiting...
loader.using_image_fallback: Download was not confirmed, using a fallback image...
loader.downloading_image: Saving the image to the local folder...
loader.exporting_image: Opening the list and saving the image...
loader.writing_inventory: Building the local character and weapon list...
loader.updating_artifact_catalog: Updating the set catalog and localized bonuses...
loader.mapping_artifact_sets: Matching HoYoLAB sets to the local catalog...
loader.closing_browser: Closing the HoYoLAB browser; continuing locally...
loader.importing_artifacts: Updating artifacts in the local database...
loader.updating_hoyolab_data: Writing HoYoLAB data and refreshing assets...
loader.account_storage_sync_warning: Account SQLite sync reported a warning...
loader.notice:
Please do not switch to other windows or place other apps above the browser until the import finishes.
During import, the app opens HoYoLAB, saves the image, and collects data automatically.
Switching windows or clicking during the process can interrupt the export.
profile.close_import_before_switch: Wait for the import to finish before signing out of profile.
profile.switch_export_warning: The current local profile data will be deleted. Before signing out, you can save it as an offline file and restore it later without importing from HoYoLAB again.
main.clear_finished: Current characters, weapons, HoYoLAB JSON, and debug files were cleared.
drag.delete_outside_assets: Only files from the assets folder can be deleted!
artifact.browser.title: Artifacts
artifact.browser.empty_for_sets: No artifacts for the selected sets.
artifact.json.clear_confirm:
Delete JSON artifacts: {count}?
Matching build preset slots will be cleared.
artifact.json.delete_affected_presets_co: After deletion, matching build preset slots will be cleared. Delete these presets?
artifact.sets.title: Sets
artifact.sort.title: Sort
artifact.sort.limit: Select up to 4 stats. Selection order = priority.
artifact.custom.unsaved_message: There are unsaved changes in custom set "{name}".
artifact.build.name: Name
artifact.build.finish_edit_first: Save or cancel preset editing first.
artifact.build.no_target_hint:
Select a target to create a preset.
Selecting multiple targets shows only presets shared by all selected targets.
To create a universal preset, select Universal.
